name: Credit One Bank® Wander® American Express® with Dining, Gas & Travel Rewards
title: Credit One Bank® Wander® American Express® with Dining, Gas & Travel Rewards (Credit One Bank)
text:
Card: Credit One Bank® Wander® American Express® with Dining, Gas & Travel Rewards (Credit One Bank)
BEST FOR EARNING ALTERNATIVE REWARDS FOR TRAVEL PURCHASES
Pros: No foreign transaction fees,Earns 10% cash back on eligible travel purchases through the Credit One Bank travel partner
Cons: Cash back is awarded as points, and can only be redeemed at a rate of 1 cent per point,$95 annual fee
Why we chose it: The revamped Wander Card from Credit One Bank earns cardmembers up to 10% cash back for eligible travel purchases through the Credit One Bank travel partner. However, cash back earned from this card (awarded as rewards points) can only be used at a fixed value, so it may not be the best option for those striving to get maximum value from their rewards.
Who it's good for: Infrequent travelers or those travelers new to earning travel rewards should consider the Wander Card from Credit One Bank.
Annual fee: $95
Rewards: 1 - 10% cash-back
APR: 29.74%* Variable,31.74%* Variable
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/travel/
